CustomField.description: Controls which matching rule the data import process uses to find existing Contact records. Determines the field combination (e.g., Firstname, Lastname, Email) used to identify duplicate Contacts before creating new ones. Default is Firstname,Lastname,Email.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the rule used to match imported data against existing Contact records. Default uses Firstname, Lastname, and Email.
CustomField.label: Contact Matching Rule
